scripts.build: bun build ./src/index.tsx --compile --minify --sourcemap --outfile ./bin/bvim --external tree-sitter --external tree-sitter-javascript --external tree-sitter-json --external tree-sitter-markdown --external tree-sitter-typescript
scripts.build:all: bun run build:linux && bun run build:darwin && bun run build:windows
scripts.build:linux: mkdir -p bin && bun build ./src/index.tsx --compile --minify --sourcemap --target=bun-linux-x64 --outfile ./bin/bvim-linux-x64 --external tree-sitter --external tree-sitter-javascript --external tree-sitter-json --external tree-sitter-markdown --external tree-sitter-typescript
scripts.build:darwin: mkdir -p bin && bun build ./src/index.tsx --compile --minify --sourcemap --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --outfile ./bin/bvim-darwin-arm64 --external tree-sitter --external tree-sitter-javascript --external tree-sitter-json --external tree-sitter-markdown --external tree-sitter-typescript
scripts.build:windows: mkdir -p bin && bun build ./src/index.tsx --compile --minify --sourcemap --target=bun-windows-x64 --outfile ./bin/bvim-windows-x64.exe --external tree-sitter --external tree-sitter-javascript --external tree-sitter-json --external tree-sitter-markdown --external tree-sitter-typescript
scripts.build:debug: bun build ./src/index.tsx --compile --outfile ./bin/bvim-debug --external tree-sitter --external tree-sitter-javascript --external tree-sitter-json --external tree-sitter-markdown --external tree-sitter-typescript
scripts.build:linux:debug: mkdir -p bin && bun build ./src/index.tsx --compile --target=bun-linux-x64 --outfile ./bin/bvim-linux-x64-debug --external tree-sitter --external tree-sitter-javascript --external tree-sitter-json --external tree-sitter-markdown --external tree-sitter-typescript
scripts.build:darwin:debug: mkdir -p bin && bun build ./src/index.tsx --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --outfile ./bin/bvim-darwin-arm64-debug --external tree-sitter --external tree-sitter-javascript --external tree-sitter-json --external tree-sitter-markdown --external tree-sitter-typescript
scripts.build:windows:debug: mkdir -p bin && bun build ./src/index.tsx --compile --target=bun-windows-x64 --outfile ./bin/bvim-windows-x64-debug.exe --external tree-sitter --external tree-sitter-javascript --external tree-sitter-json --external tree-sitter-markdown --external tree-sitter-typescript
